description: Norwegian characters on base, American on Layer 1, right-hand mouse with scroll

changes.section: CRITICAL: Norwegian Characters on Base Layer

changes.label: ø
changes.rationale: Norwegian ø where ; is on US keyboard (home row after L). Typing Norwegian directly without modifiers.
changes.note: Use Unicode or international key code for ø

changes.label: æ
changes.rationale: Norwegian æ where ' is on US keyboard (home row after ø).
changes.note: Use Unicode or international key code for æ

changes.label: å
changes.rationale: Norwegian å where [ is on US keyboard (top row after P).
changes.note: Use Unicode or international key code for å

changes.rationale: Period in correct position for typing flow. This position currently has [ which moves to å.
American ; on Layer 1 (same position as ø on base). Replaces duplicate RIGHT arrow.
American ' on Layer 1 (same position as æ on base). Currently empty.
American [ on Layer 1 (same position as å on base). Currently empty.

changes.label: Search
changes.rationale: Left-hand: Hold Nav thumb + tap A position = Win+S Windows Search

changes.label: PT Run
changes.rationale: Left-hand: Hold Nav thumb + tap S position = Alt+Space PowerToys Run

changes.label: Search
changes.rationale: Right-hand: Hold Window thumb + tap H position = Win+S. Position 7,2 is likely mouse button.
changes.alternative: If (3,7,2) is empty, use that instead for index finger access

changes.label: PT Run
changes.rationale: Right-hand: Hold Window thumb + tap L position = Alt+Space. Replaces Ctrl+GUI+F4.

changes.label: Scroll
changes.rationale: Pinky finger scroll toggle on home row. In mouse mode, tap to enable scroll, tap again to disable. Uses Layer 6 overlay.
changes.position_note: Pinky finger, home row, rightmost column - currently empty

implementation_notes: NORWEGIAN CHARACTERS:
ZMK Studio may not have direct ø/æ/å keys in dropdown.
Workaround options:
1. Use Windows International keyboard layout + dead keys
2. Use ZMK Unicode feature (if available)
3. Use macro to send Unicode codepoints: ø=U+00F8, æ=U+00E6, å=U+00E5
4. Set Windows keyboard to Norwegian, then these positions automatically type ø/æ/å
RECOMMENDED APPROACH:
Set Windows keyboard layout to Norwegian (Norway) as default.
Then keycodes for positions 10/2, 11/2, 12/1 will automatically produce ø/æ/å.
No ZMK changes needed - just use standard Key Press with the key at that position.
LAYER 6 SCROLL MODE:
Requires PMW3610 input processor configuration.
When Layer 6 active: trackball Y → vertical scroll, trackball X → horizontal scroll (optional).
If ZMK doesn't support input processor layers, use &msc behavior instead:
- Bind (2,12,2) to scroll down while held
- But this requires holding, which conflicts with trackball thumb usage
- Toggle layer approach is better for this use case
MOUSE MODE ENTRY (already working):
Right hand only: Hold thumb (0,8,4) + tap pinky (3,10,2) = lock Layer 2
LAUNCHER POSITIONS:
Left hand: A+S positions on Layer 1 (easy reach)
Right hand: Avoiding y=2 mouse buttons, using available positions on Layer 3
Total key changes: 11
Breaking changes: None (all additions or smart swaps)
Requires firmware rebuild: No (all done via ZMK Studio)

usage_summary.norwegian_typing: Type ø/æ/å directly on base layer - no modifiers needed
usage_summary.american_punctuation: Hold Nav thumb (x3,y4) + tap same positions for ;'[
usage_summary.period_comma: Both on base layer in standard positions
usage_summary.launchers_left: Hold Nav + tap A (Search) or S (PowerToys)
usage_summary.launchers_right: Hold Window + tap H or L positions
usage_summary.mouse_mode: Hold Window thumb + tap pinky to lock mouse layer
usage_summary.scroll_mode: In mouse mode, tap pinky to toggle scroll on/off
usage_summary.exit_mouse: Tap right thumb to return to base
